sections.heading: Building
sections.body: Kuro-platform — a unified dashboard for all my projects. Also watching KuroTrader accumulate paper trading history to see if the edge holds.

sections.heading: Reading
sections.body: Papers on causality and physical law. Reality Lab is on day 20 — still finding interesting corners.

sections.heading: Listening
sections.body: KLAWZ unreleased tracks. Sitting at 12 published, more in the pipeline.

sections.heading: Studying
sections.body: Japanese — pushing toward N3. Causative-passive constructions are genuinely tricky.
